ops.text: synckit's CHANGELOG.md (Keep a Changelog format) has had no release section since v0.4.2 (2026-06-27) — v0.5.0 through v0.11.0 shipped without entries and the [Unreleased] block holds months of stale already-released content (TUI fixes, busy-awareness). Today's v0.9.0/v0.10.0/v0.11.0 watch-backend releases continued the drift. Either backfill the missing sections from tag history or drop the convention deliberately; the half-maintained state misleads anyone reading [Unreleased] as pending work. cookie-sync's CHANGELOG, by contrast, is actively maintained per release.
